name: dero-hive
description: DERO Hive - a feature-rich AI harness supporting OpenAI-compatible providers, MCP, and tools
author: DERO

scripts.postinstall: node scripts/patch-codex-acp.mjs && node scripts/patch-sqlite3-dual.mjs && node scripts/setup-whisper.mjs && node scripts/setup-mcp.mjs && node scripts/setup-simulator.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:cli
scripts.test:renderer: tsx src/renderer/src/lib/codeRunner.test.ts && tsx src/renderer/src/lib/customSlashCommands.test.ts && tsx src/renderer/src/lib/audioWav.test.ts && tsx src/renderer/src/lib/speech.test.ts && tsx src/renderer/src/lib/theme.test.ts
scripts.test:vision: tsx src/renderer/src/lib/visionViewer.test.ts && tsx src/renderer/src/lib/visionArtifacts.test.ts && tsx src/renderer/src/lib/visionFilters.test.ts && tsx src/renderer/src/lib/artifacts.test.ts && tsx src/renderer/src/lib/thinking.test.ts && tsx src/renderer/src/lib/visionRender.test.ts
scripts.test:shared: tsx src/shared/diff.test.ts && tsx src/shared/deroReferences.test.ts && tsx src/shared/thinkingCapabilities.test.ts && tsx src/shared/gnomon.test.ts && tsx src/shared/agents.test.ts && tsx src/shared/dvm.test.ts && tsx src/shared/modelMetadata.test.ts && tsx src/shared/presets.test.ts && tsx src/shared/types.test.ts && tsx src/shared/defaults.test.ts && tsx src/shared/media.test.ts && tsx src/shared/diffNarrator.test.ts && tsx src/main/utils/tokenBudget.test.ts && tsx src/main/utils/attachments.test.ts && tsx src/main/skills/loader.test.ts && tsx src/main/knowledge/automation.test.ts && tsx src/main/utils/pathPolicy.test.ts && tsx src/main/utils/paths.test.ts && tsx src/main/utils/secrets.test.ts && tsx src/main/mcp/validateMcpConfig.test.ts
scripts.test:cli: tsx cli/src/tui/commands.test.ts && tsx cli/src/services/conversation.test.ts && tsx cli/src/services/permissions.test.ts && tsx cli/src/tui/render.test.ts && tsx cli/src/utils/format.test.ts && tsx cli/src/tui/themes.test.ts && tsx cli/src/utils/systemPrompt.test.ts && tsx cli/src/utils/agentMemory.test.ts && tsx cli/src/utils/agentMemoryOps.test.ts && tsx cli/src/services/resolveProviderChain.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:vision && npm run test:shared && npm run test:cli && npm run lint && npm run lint:cli
